goal: Build an optional persistent lexical semantic index for DeepSeek-native context ranking and use fresh entries before falling back to bounded file-content scans.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Context ranking can scan file contents during one run but loses reusable semantic file evidence between runs, forcing repeated reads and leaving the DeepSeek context selector without a persistent local index.
